description_long: This sculpture depicts the bust of a bearded man with deeply set eyes, prominent cheekbones, and a voluminous mane of curly hair and beard. The facial expression is intense and lifelike, with detailed rendering of the hair and facial features. The bust is truncated at the shoulders and the top of the head is flat and unfinished, suggesting it may be a fragment or a stylized artistic choice. The surface texture is rough and matte, with visible chisel marks and irregularities that give it a hand-carved stone appearance. The back of the sculpture shows the hair cascading in thick, textured locks, while the chest and shoulders are simplified and less detailed. The overall coloration is a uniform dark gray, resembling weathered stone or concrete.
description: A rough-textured, dark gray bust of a bearded man with detailed curly hair and an unfinished, flat top. The sculpture has a lifelike face and a stylized, simplified torso.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the thick, textured curls of hair and the broad, rough back of the bust.
description_view_1: Three-quarter front view highlighting the intense facial features, curly beard, and the unfinished top of the head.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the profile of the face, the deep-set eyes, and the detailed beard and hair.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the intricate hair texture and the simplified, rounded back of the bust.
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; background is neutral and does not indicate a specific setting.
